---
title: "AntSciHub"
listing:
  - id: templates-list
    contents: "Templates/**/*Template.qmd"
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-links: [title]
    field-display-names:
      title: "Name"
      description: "Description"
    sort: title
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

Welcome to AntSciHub v4

Currently trying this out as a pilot for a lab notebook setup. Please excuse the dust 🏗️

# Resources

# Templates

These templates are maintained as reusable Quarto starting points.

::: {#templates-list}
:::
